text:
Monthly values for the 10th of up to 10 waiver IDs. There are separate variables for each of the 12 
months during the year. The last two digits of this variable indicate the month. 

SHORT NAME: WVR_ID_10_01 
WVR_ID_10_02 
WVR_ID_10_03

WVR_ID_10_06

WVR_ID_10_10 
WVR_ID_10_11 
WVR_ID_10_12
